title: Marker Tower Builder
description: Craft enchanted shovels that build 100-block-high marker towers when dropped. Replaces tower-building hassle with effortless animated FUN!!
body:
## Marker Tower Builder (singleplayer and multiplayer)

This mod lets you craft a **Marker Tower Builder**, an enchanted shovel which magically builds a simple marker tower when dropped. It takes the hassle out of building marker towers _and replaces it with fun!_    
   
![Marker Tower Builder animated banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/845c6dc82aad19d92d215efcc0b2a7ad8aa8bfb6.gif)
     
Marker Tower Builder offers a quick, easy way to build illuminated marker towers with some **deeply satisfying animations and sound effects**, making it _actually fun_ (and super-quick) to leave a chain of markers behind you as you travel, marking your route. Or just throw a few down to mark your base, like this:   
    
![Multiple marker towers built very close together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdcd041b8061136e661061528e346ac2c78ba372.jpeg)
<small>This is really a lot though. This is too many.</small>   

## Craft and /give    

Marker Tower Builder crafting ingredients are stone shovel, torch, and cobblestone block. The ingredients can be placed anywhere in the crafting grid.   

![Marker Tower Builder recipe in crafting table grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae5023d6825a1cfeaeb322ea8f2017c2cd3bbfd.gif)
   
You can also enter this command in chat:   
**/give @s stick[custom_name={"text":"Marker Tower Builder"}] 1**    
    
Increase the number at the end of the command to get more Marker Tower Builders, but bear in mind that they require one slot each, they won't stack in inventory.
